title: GPS Mode Visibility Fix — Customer Booking Form

requirements.summary: Conditionally render Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields based on locationMode state in RideRequestForm.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting 'Use GPS' (locationMode === 'gps') causes Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields to disappear from the DOM or be hidden via conditional rendering.
Selecting 'Manual' (locationMode === 'manual') causes Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields to be visible and marked as required.
No other fields are affected by this change.

file_operations.description: Wrap the Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area form fields (FormField components for pickupLocation.pincode and pickupLocation.area) in a conditional rendering block that checks locationMode === 'manual'. When locationMode is 'gps', these fields should not render at all. When locationMode is 'manual', both fields remain visible and required as they currently are.

requirements.summary: Handle GPS permission denial by reverting to manual mode and displaying an error message in RideRequestForm.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: When the browser denies geolocation permission, locationMode is set to 'manual' automatically.
After permission denial, Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields reappear and are required.
The error message 'Location permission denied. Please enter pickup manually.' is displayed near the pickup section.
The existing navigator.geolocation call is not removed or restructured.

file_operations.description: Inside the existing geolocation error callback (the second callback to navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition), add logic to set locationMode back to 'manual' using setLocationMode('manual'). Also set a new error state variable (e.g., gpsError) with the message 'Location permission denied. Please enter pickup manually.' Display this error message conditionally near the pickup location section (above or below the location mode radio buttons). Clear the error message when the user manually switches locationMode or successfully uses GPS.
